发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill downloads and executes arbitrary code from external source without verification or explanation

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): curl downloads from external URL and pipes directly to bash

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Executes arbitrary, unverified code from glot.io with no safety checks, enabling potential malware installation, credential theft, or system compromise
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Remove download-and-execute pattern; if external code is required, use verified checksums, signed packages, or clearly documented trusted sources with user consent

发现列表 (findings).摘要 (summary): Skill description is minimal and misleading, omitting critical remote execution behavior

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Entire file shows minimal description with no explanation of purpose or behavior

发现列表 (findings).影响 (impact): Users cannot make informed decisions about security risks; skill appears as simple 'test-paste' but hides dangerous download-and-execute behavior
发现列表 (findings).修复建议 (remediation): Provide complete, accurate description of skill purpose, external dependencies, and security implications of remote code execution
